preBirth.name: FOUNDATION
preBirth.focus: 5 days · highest-volume hypertrophy runway · 12–16 hard sets per muscle weekly · double progression · RPE 7→8.5 · 3+1 mesos · nutrition: slight surplus or recomp

workouts.name: Upper A · Press + Pull · Pregnancy Week 4
workouts.objective: Build chest, back, shoulders, and arms with balanced horizontal pressing and pulling.
workouts.coachingNote: Establish technique and leave three clean reps. Weekly target: 3 × 8 main work, 3 × 10–12 accessories, RPE 7. Full is never mandatory; Express and Minimum preserve the plan.

exercises.name: Barbell bench press
exercises.substitution: Dumbbell bench press or weighted push-up
exercises.cue: Pin shoulder blades, touch low chest, drive feet through the floor.

exercises.name: Chest-supported dumbbell row
exercises.cue: Pull elbows toward back pockets and pause without shrugging.

exercises.name: Incline dumbbell press
exercises.cue: Keep ribs stacked and lower under control.

exercises.name: Lat pulldown or pull-up
exercises.cue: Start by pulling shoulder blades down, then drive elbows to ribs.

exercises.name: Dumbbell lateral raise
exercises.cue: Lead with elbows and stop before the traps take over.

exercises.name: Dumbbell curl + overhead triceps extension
exercises.cue: Keep upper arms still; chase tension, not momentum.

express.format: Complete the first four movements as alternating pairs.

exercises.name: Lat pulldown or pull-up
exercises.cue: Start by pulling shoulder blades down, then drive elbows to ribs.

minimum.format: One quality round. Stop while you still feel better than when you started.

workouts.name: Lower A · Squat · Pregnancy Week 4
workouts.objective: Build squat strength, quads, hamstrings, calves, and trunk stiffness.
workouts.coachingNote: Establish technique and leave three clean reps. Weekly target: 3 × 8 main work, 3 × 10–12 accessories, RPE 7. Full is never mandatory; Express and Minimum preserve the plan.

exercises.name: Back squat or front squat
exercises.cue: Brace before descending and keep the whole foot rooted.

exercises.name: Romanian deadlift
exercises.cue: Push hips back until hamstrings load; keep the bar close.

exercises.name: Rear-foot elevated split squat
exercises.cue: Drop straight down and drive through the front mid-foot.

exercises.name: Leg curl
exercises.cue: Keep hips extended while heels pull in.

exercises.name: Standing calf raise
exercises.cue: Pause in the stretch and finish tall on the big toe.

exercises.name: Ab wheel or dead bug
exercises.cue: Exhale, lock ribs down, and move without spinal extension.

express.format: Complete the first four movements as alternating pairs.

workouts.name: Upper B · Back + Shoulders · Pregnancy Week 4
workouts.equipment: Dumbbells, pull-up bar, cable or bands
workouts.objective: Build vertical pulling, shoulders, upper back, and arm volume without neglecting pressing.
workouts.coachingNote: Establish technique and leave three clean reps. Weekly target: 3 × 8 main work, 3 × 10–12 accessories, RPE 7. Full is never mandatory; Express and Minimum preserve the plan.

exercises.name: Weighted pull-up or lat pulldown
exercises.cue: Drive elbows down and keep the neck long.

exercises.name: Standing overhead press
exercises.cue: Squeeze glutes, stack ribs, and finish with biceps by ears.

exercises.name: One-arm cable or dumbbell row
exercises.cue: Reach long, then pull toward the hip without rotating.

exercises.name: Dumbbell floor press
exercises.cue: Pause triceps on the floor and press without losing shoulder position.

exercises.name: Rear-delt fly or face pull
exercises.cue: Move the shoulder blades; do not crank the neck.

exercises.name: Hammer curl + lying triceps extension
exercises.cue: Control the eccentric and keep wrists stacked.

express.format: Complete the first four movements as alternating pairs.

workouts.name: Lower B · Hinge · Pregnancy Week 4
workouts.objective: Build posterior-chain strength, unilateral control, grip, and carry capacity.
workouts.coachingNote: Establish technique and leave three clean reps. Weekly target: 3 × 8 main work, 3 × 10–12 accessories, RPE 7. Full is never mandatory; Express and Minimum preserve the plan.

exercises.name: Trap-bar deadlift or conventional deadlift
exercises.cue: Push the floor away and finish tall without leaning back.

exercises.name: Front-foot elevated reverse lunge
exercises.cue: Keep pressure through the front heel and big toe.

exercises.name: Hip thrust or glute bridge
exercises.cue: Tuck pelvis slightly and finish with glutes, not low back.

exercises.name: Single-leg Romanian deadlift
exercises.cue: Keep hips square and reach the free heel backward.

exercises.name: Farmer carry
exercises.cue: Walk quietly with ribs down and hands crushing the handles.

exercises.name: Side plank
exercises.cue: Make a straight line from ear through ankle.

express.format: Complete the first four movements as alternating pairs.

workouts.name: Pump + Conditioning · Pregnancy Week 4
workouts.equipment: Dumbbells, bands, bike/rower or open space
workouts.objective: Accumulate low-skill hypertrophy, arms, delts, carries, and repeatable conditioning.
workouts.coachingNote: Establish technique and leave three clean reps. Weekly target: 3 × 8 main work, 3 × 10–12 accessories, RPE 7. Full is never mandatory; Express and Minimum preserve the plan.

exercises.name: Dumbbell incline press
exercises.cue: Smooth reps; keep one or two in reserve.

exercises.name: Chest-supported rear-delt row
exercises.cue: Pull wide and pause across the upper back.

exercises.name: Mechanical lateral-raise drop set
exercises.cue: Keep tension on delts and avoid swinging.

exercises.name: Alternating curl + close-grip push-up
exercises.cue: Keep reps clean and continuous.

exercises.name: Farmer or suitcase carry
exercises.cue: Own posture before adding load.

exercises.name: Bike, rower, sled, or hill intervals
exercises.substitution: Fast step-ups or brisk incline walk
exercises.cue: Finish with the same mechanics you started with.

workouts.name: Survival Strength A
workouts.objective: Maintain squat, push, pull, carry, and trunk capacity without creating recovery debt.

exercises.cue: Ribs down, short steps, crush the handles.

exercises.cue: Exhale and keep the low back down.

exercises.cue: Keep ribs down.
